chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal No.351 of 2023 Greeno Corporation (Pvt.) Ltd Versus Province of Sindh and others DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing case (priority) 1. For order on CMA No.662/2024 (U/A). 2. For order on CMA No.599/2024 (U/O-23 R-1 CPC). 3. For order on office objection. 4. For hearing of main case. 5. For hearing of CMA No.4243/2023 (Stay)..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 15.03.2024 Mr. Ayan Mustafa Memon, Advocate for the Appellant..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. 1) Urgency granted. 2) This is an application for unconditional withdrawal of this appeal supported by affidavit of one Feroz Khan, authorized officer of the appellant. Since it is an unconditional withdrawal, the application is allowed and the appeal is dismissed as withdrawn along with pending application(s) with no order as to costs. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
